overall.description: A cinematic third-person perspective from a video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2) follows a cowboy character walking through an overcast prairie landscape. The character travels along a dirt path that transitions to rocky terrain, encountering horseback riders and a horse-drawn carriage in the isolated grasslands.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with dirt path

events.description: two riders on horseback enter from the right and gallop past the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path carrying a rifle, moving through tall prairie grass

notable_agents.action: two riders on horseback galloping past from right to left

entered.detail: wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires lining the path
worn dirt trail cutting through the tall grass
tall yellowish-brown prairie grass covering the rolling hills
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon under dark clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through an overcast prairie, with utility poles lining the right side. Two riders on horseback suddenly appear from the right and gallop past, continuing down the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie grassland transitioning to rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain gradually becomes rockier and more uneven

entered.detail: loose stones and small rocks beginning to appear on the path surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks alone through the open grassland as the dirt path gradually becomes scattered with rocks. The utility poles recede into the distance on the right while the landscape remains vast and empty.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky prairie path with stone outcroppings

events.description: horse-drawn carriage approaches from ahead and passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking on the rocky path as a carriage passes, then continuing alone into the prairie

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving along the path and passing the character

entered.detail: path composed of exposed stone slabs and gravel replacing the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions to a rocky stone path as a horse-drawn carriage approaches from the distance and passes by. The character continues walking alone through the desolate prairie as the terrain becomes increasingly rugged.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an overcast prairie that transforms from a structured dirt path into a rugged, rocky wasteland. It begins with the character walking along a dirt road lined with utility poles, just as two riders on horseback gallop past from the right and disappear ahead. As the character continues forward, the utility poles recede into the distance and the path gradually becomes scattered with stones, opening up into a vast and empty grassland. The scene then shifts as the ground transitions fully into a rocky stone path, where a horse-drawn carriage approaches from the distance and passes by. Finally, the camera follows the character walking alone through the desolate prairie as the terrain becomes increasingly rugged and desolate.
